# CWE-826: Premature Release of Resource During Expected Lifetime
lang: go
file: CWE-826-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: closes the shared pool before a background query finishes.
func WarmCache(c *gin.Context, db *sql.DB) {
	done := make(chan struct{})
	go func() {
		_, _ = db.Query("SELECT pg_sleep(1)")
		close(done)
	}()
	_ = db.Close()
	<-done
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
